core_mechanism: the large-deviation principle: the probability of a rare aggregate fluctuation decays exponentially in a scale parameter, P ~ exp(-N I(x)), with a convex rate function I obtained as the Legendre-Fenchel transform of a scaled cumulant/generating function, whose minimizer selects the typical state and whose non-convex regions signal transitions
brief_reason: The abstract centers on exponential-order estimates of the probability of large fluctuations governed by a rate function tied to variational principles and Legendre transforms (including their breaking for nonconcave entropies), which is precisely the large-deviation rate-function/Legendre-transform machinery.
